g.onclick: sendPrompt('How often does DevTrails poll environmental APIs?')
g.text: Rainfall 15 min · Temp 30 min · AQI 1 hr

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does DevTrails evaluate disruption thresholds per zone?')
sendPrompt('How is the zone disruption score calculated?')
sendPrompt('What happens when no disruption is detected?')
sendPrompt('How does DevTrails verify a rider was in the disruption zone?')
sendPrompt('How is the payout amount calculated for a disruption event?')
sendPrompt('How is the insurance payout released to the rider?')
